name: frutiger-aero
description: Frutiger Aero 乐观科技风格 - 玻璃高光、水感气泡、天空草地、2000 年代企业科技乌托邦
prompt_template: Frutiger Aero PPT slide, optimistic 2000s tech-utopia aesthetic, glossy translucent glass panels over aqua sky background {background}, bright clean palette {palette}, rounded glossy cards, water bubbles, soft lens flare, bokeh light circles, wave swooshes, fresh eco-tech atmosphere, humanist sans-serif typography, polished corporate future mood, --ar {aspect_ratio} --style raw --v 6
negative_prompt: dark cyberpunk, dystopian city, brutalist blocks, matte flat minimalism, grunge texture, vintage paper, muted earth tones, harsh shadows, cluttered collage, gothic, rusty industrial, photorealistic people
